prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: COMPLEX OF INDOLE-3-GLYCEROLPHOSPHATE SYNTHASE FROM SULFOLOBUS SOLFATARICUS WITH INDOLE-3-GLYCEROLPHOSPHATE AT 2.0 A RESOLUTION. Entity description: INDOLE-3-GLYCEROLPHOSPHATE SYNTHASE. Entry keywords: SYNTHASE SYNTHASE, THERMOSTABLE, TIM-BARREL. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.
